title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.MenC ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.MenC ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes
